title: Affirm Holdings Q2 Earnings Preview
text: Affirm Holdings (AFRM) is anticipated to report earnings for the quarter ended December 2024 on February 6, 2025. The market expects a year-over-year decline in earnings on higher revenues. Expected Results: EPS: Loss of $0.21 per share (representing a -625% year-over-year change). Revenue: $803.48 million (up 35.9% from the prior year). Analyst Outlook: The consensus EPS estimate has been significantly revised downward—revised 47.14% lower over the last 30 days—reflecting changing analyst assessments of the company's performance. Earnings Surprise Prediction: Affirm's Earnings ESP (Expected Surprise Prediction) score is -55.03%, indicating that recent analyst revisions have turned bearish. Combined with its Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy), this combination makes it difficult to conclusively predict that Affirm Holdings will beat the consensus EPS estimate. Historical Context: Notably, Affirm has demonstrated some resilience in beating expectations. In the last reported quarter, the company delivered a +13.89% earnings surprise and has beaten estimates three times over the last four quarters.
